g.text: What The Player Does At Contact

text.style: font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Google Sans', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #666666

g.text: Serge Gnabry · FC Bayern München · xG 0.031 · BSQ 0.89 · low chance, high execution

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; font-family: 'Google Sans', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #111111

font-size: 10.5px; font-family: 'Google Sans', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #111111

g.text: The chance is difficult by xG, so the quality has to come from body shape, contact, release speed, and placement.

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 12.2px; font-family: 'Google Sans', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #111111

g.text: Inference: difficult chances do not become high-quality attempts by location alone; the separator is the body-and-ball execution at contact.
